title: 3010s Troll Potential
wikitext:
[]: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by intermediateO » Wed May 27, 2020 1:29 am I thought it might be fun to discuss all the ideas that people have come up with over the years about how 3.0+1.0 might troll everyone once it's finally released. I feel like some people like to say that the ending of the TV series was a big troll, or even that Anno was trolling his fanbase with EoE and calling them out, but I think he was just doing the best with the resources he had available at the time. (though fan feedback definitely did influence EoE) With 3.0 though, I definitely think that Anno was trolling. In a fun way. Not malicious. And mainly just in regards to the time-skip. With the whole "Curse of Eva" schtick and revealing the first footage months before its release with the Asuka-in-space fight, and then using that same fight as a promo that aired on tv the night before 3.0 came out. I definitely think he was trying to set people up for whiplash when the movie started and they found out that 14 years had passed. So here are just some things I think he could troll us with this time. ･Avant 1 and/or the teaser footage we've seen isn't actually in the final film (ala the 3.0 preview at the end of 2.0) ･parallel universe hijinks (the TV series is directly referenced in some way) ･time-travel hijinks (Shinji literally goes back in time to 1.0) ･this is actually not the final film, ends with a preview of 3.0+2.0 (based on the mystery of the wierd three date listing on Anno's lantern) SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 27, 2020 3:28 am The seven-part god (True Evangelion) that forms (from Lilith, the four Adams, Yui, and Gendo) splits into seven individual gods after Final Impact is complete. They all leave Earth and go to separate planets. Troll the people frothing at the mouth for an NGE sequel by implying it was an NGE prequel the whole time. (Blame goes to Lavinius for this idea.) The ending is otherwise just RahXephon with an Eva coat of paint, complete with the counterpart mecha fusing together and the world being retuned and rainbows and eggs and things. This is a "take that" at the people from the late 90s who wouldn't shut the fuck up about RahXephon being an Eva ripoff.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed May 27, 2020 3:34 am I'd be down for just about any ending troll. The fallout would be glorious to watch unfold

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Wed May 27, 2020 3:50 am -The movie contains messages from the internet about people that disliked 3.0, including Evageeks. The internet presumably explodes right after. -Shinji gets over his problems and learns to love himself in the first 20 minutes of the movie. He and the rest of the cast go to space and Hideaki Anno finally makes a Yamato anime. -A completely new character pops out of nowhere and eats up all of the runtime. Becomes a fan favourite immediately. -The movie is just plain bad I slit my wrists. Or get disappointed for at least a year. And I'm sure people can come up with more.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by intermediateO » Wed May 27, 2020 4:49 am Reichu wrote: Troll the people frothing at the mouth for an NGE sequel by implying it was an NGE prequel the whole time. (Blame goes to Lavinius for this idea.)

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed May 27, 2020 5:43 am It feels like I'm one of the few who doesn't believe Anno is a troll, but it's a fun meme, so.... Mari is discovered to be a miniaturized Evangelion unit. She drinks LCL and turns into a Beast Mode of her own. Misato discovers that the NGE timeline has been occurring just out of frame the entire time, complete with its own, mostly identical cast. The animated bits we've seen so far are the only animated scenes in the movie. The rest is live-action, fully making it a "Shin" movie from Anno. (Both Shin Godzilla and Shin Ultraman are live-action films.)

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Wed May 27, 2020 7:02 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: The animated bits we've seen so far are the only animated scenes in the movie. The rest is live-action, fully making it a "Shin" movie from Anno. (Both Shin Godzilla and Shin Ultraman are live-action films.)

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Shun » Wed May 27, 2020 7:35 am - A giant hand comes out of the Guf, he is Hideaki Anno dressed as Ultraman, he eat toffee and Moyoco slap him - Anno destroys fiction, looks at the camera and starts clapping: congratulations!

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by robersora » Wed May 27, 2020 8:27 am I feel like the biggest troll already happened, by having the movie delayed indefinitely for the time being. (of course that's due to a pandemic outside of anyone's control, but still)

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Derantor » Wed May 27, 2020 8:36 am Oooof, there are so many ways that Shin could troll the audience ... intermediateO wrote: ･Avant 1 and/or the teaser footage we've seen isn't actually in the final film (ala the 3.0 preview at the end of 2.0)

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed May 27, 2020 10:58 pm I mean sure, Shin could just throw some random curveball, yell "sUbVeRtInG eXpEcTaTiOnS!!!!111" and call it a day; but I like to think that Anno is a bit more capable at his job than that :P I'm expecting one of the main trolls to be a massive backhand to one or another widely spread theory or pairing; beyond that, I'll just wait and see

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 28, 2020 2:28 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: It feels like I'm one of the few who doesn't believe Anno is a troll, but it's a fun meme, so....

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Derantor » Thu May 28, 2020 7:31 am Blockio wrote: I mean sure, Shin could just throw some random curveball, yell "sUbVeRtInG eXpEcTaTiOnS!!!!111" and call it a day; but I like to think that Anno is a bit more capable at his job than that :P

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu May 28, 2020 2:46 pm Reichu wrote: "Trolling the audience" is the same thing as "challenging the audience" (to an audience that doesn't want to be challenged).

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri May 29, 2020 3:52 am Reichu wrote: The ending is otherwise just RahXephon with an Eva coat of paint, complete with the counterpart mecha fusing together and the world being retuned and rainbows and eggs and things. This is a "take that" at the people from the late 90s who wouldn't shut the fuck up about RahXephon being an Eva ripoff.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat May 30, 2020 9:10 pm Derantor wrote: Like releasing a trailer that has nothing to do with the movie that gets released eventually? So why not say "Shin will be an ending for all of Eva" and then it isn't an ending at all? Seriously though, I thought we were talking about trolling; trying to rile people up just for the fun of it. (Edit: And I don't think Anno is that kind of troll.) If we are talking about what Reichu said above, that's something entirely different.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun May 31, 2020 1:58 am Remember what happened to the Harry Potter Forums... Twas a nightmare.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun May 31, 2020 3:56 am Velorex wrote: Remember what happened to the Harry Potter Forums... Twas a nightmare.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by Velorex » Sun May 31, 2020 7:13 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: Dare I ask what happened to the Harry Potter forums?

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0's Troll Potential             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jun 03, 2020 1:29 am Velorex wrote: but basically after a long battle against spoiler-trolls; the site admin got hacked and the hacker emailed all the spoilers to all the user's by email... they had to shut down the forums for a few months
